def counter_for_hk(num):
    if type(num) != int:
        print("一定要入整數!")
    else:
        if num < 10:
            print("要大過10")
        else:
            replace_char = "光復香港時代革命"
            i = num
            while i > 0:
                if i < len(replace_char) + 1:
                    print(replace_char[-i])
                else:
                    print(i)
                i -= 1
            print(replace_char)

replies.msg:
def countdown_to_2020(sec: int):
       slogan = “光復香港時代革命”
       print (slogan[i] if i < len(slogan) else i for i in range(sec, -1, -1))

def counter_for_hk(num: int):
    replace_char: str = "光復香港時代革命"
    try:
        if num < 10:
            print("要大過10")
        else:

            i: int = num
            while i > 0:
                if i < len(replace_char) + 1:
                    print(replace_char[-i])
                else:
                    print(i)
                i -= 1
    except TypeError:
        print("一定要入整數!")
    finally:
        print(replace_char)

改少少

const countdown2020 = () => {
    const slogan = '　　光復香港時代革命';
    const counter = setInterval(() => {
        const sec = Math.floor((1577808000000 - Date.now()) / 1000);
        console.log(sec > 10 ? sec : slogan[10 - sec]);
        if (sec <= 1) clearInterval(counter);
    }, 1000);
};
